h9c089ee0g5498g432dgba3egc06f3e17e769: Do not expect thanks for killing goblins. For all I know, you had something to do with Halsin's disappearance.
h4fa7b797g9d6ag4c5fg8a2dg38d9b84c299c: It's outsiders like you who brought trouble in the first place. Away - I detest the sight of you.
hdcac7cd0g0da2g4909gaeb6g49cb920eff96: You may be in Halsin's good graces, but mine are another matter. This grove is a darker place for your presence.
hb95ed4bbg79c9g4c61ga137ga38f5668748f: Be gone - surely you have others to bother.
h85d9e6c6g1a3fg41e2ga3dbgccfdd2e5163a: You may have won over Kagha, but I'm not so easily swayed.
hb2153e0bg5226g49e0g89a7g57a2142d5ace: Remember - this is our grove. You are never far from watching eyes.
h617e400dg7d3fg4bdeg9431g8264b952fcc0: That poor child. This should never have happened. You people should have left when Kagha asked.
ha50a625agfe1eg41f4gb9b3g3172910451ca: Goblin attacks and now a dead child. We never should have opened our gates.
he981ec73g11b2g409cgba9eg8bbd3af81373: No doubt the tieflings will blame us for the child's death. This is a disaster.
he8be60dfg030eg440dg80f4g6f4d68d66972: What will you people want next? Letting the hell child go was a mistake.
hbd9a6e6fgdff6g429bg8402g1499ce3fe39a: What will the tieflings want next? Letting the hell child go was a mistake.
hb1ec5bc6g08c5g4827gb7fbg6e772718947c: Leave me. I detest the smell of sulphur.
h2162972fg429ag4017ga5eeg47d7d76d2bed: By Silvanus - another outsider. Should you have an ounce of sense, you will leave. Immediately.
